rtp.editForm.title: Edit timing
rtp.recurrencerForm.title: Define a recurring timing
rtp.recurrencerForm.everyMonthByDate: Every {dayNumber, selectordinal, one {#st} two {#nd} few {#rd} other {#th}} of the month
rtp.recurrencerForm.everyMonthByWeekday: Every {weekNumber, selectordinal, one {#st} two {#nd} few {#rd} other {#th}} {weekday} of the month
rtp.recurrencerForm.endBeforeStart: The end date must be after the begin
rtp.definedTimings: {timingsCount, plural, =0 {No defined timings} one {# defined timing} other {# defined timings}} {timingsCount, plural, =0 {} other {at {when, date, short}}}
rtp.definedTimingsInRange: {timingsCount, plural, =0 {No defined timings} one {# defined timing} other {# defined timings}} from {from, date, short} to {to, date, short}
rtp.defineTiming: Click and drag on the grid to set a timing
